subject: web_sys_m2
title: Web Systems M2 — Node.js, Express, MongoDB & Docker

multipleChoice.text: Which JavaScript runtime is built on Chrome's V8 engine and allows JavaScript to run outside the browser?
multipleChoice.hint: It's the environment that made server-side JavaScript possible.

multipleChoice.text: What does WAMP stand for?
multipleChoice.hint: Common web development stack on Windows.

multipleChoice.text: Which Node.js core module is used to read and write files?
multipleChoice.hint: Short for File System.

multipleChoice.text: In a Dockerfile, which instruction sets the base image?
multipleChoice.hint: This is always the first line of most Dockerfiles.

multipleChoice.text: Which MongoDB method is used to insert a single document?
multipleChoice.hint: The method name clearly indicates inserting a single item.

multipleChoice.text: What is the default port for MySQL?
multipleChoice.hint: MySQL's standard port number.

multipleChoice.text: Which SQL command is used to retrieve data from a database?
multipleChoice.hint: Most common command for fetching records.

multipleChoice.text: Which Express method is used to handle HTTP GET requests?
multipleChoice.hint: Corresponds to the most common HTTP method for fetching resources.

multipleChoice.text: What is a Docker container?
options: A running instance of a Docker image
multipleChoice.hint: An image is the blueprint; this is what you run.

multipleChoice.text: Which Node.js object provides access to environment variables?
multipleChoice.hint: It also has properties like .argv and .exit.

multipleChoice.text: Which MySQL statement is used to add new records?
multipleChoice.hint: Commonly used with INTO.

multipleChoice.text: In Node.js, what is the purpose of npm?
multipleChoice.hint: Node Package Manager.

multipleChoice.text: Which SQL clause is used to filter rows?
multipleChoice.hint: It appears after FROM and before ORDER BY.

multipleChoice.text: What is the role of the Express framework in a Node.js application?
options: To build web applications and APIs
multipleChoice.hint: It is a minimal and flexible Node.js framework.

multipleChoice.text: What does the `docker build` command do?
options: Builds an image from a Dockerfile
Pushes an image to a registry
multipleChoice.hint: It creates an image based on instructions.

multipleChoice.text: Which PHP extension is commonly used to connect to MySQL?
multipleChoice.hint: Improved MySQL extension.

multipleChoice.text: What does AUTO_INCREMENT do in MySQL?
multipleChoice.hint: Used with primary keys for unique IDs.

multipleChoice.text: Which Docker command is used to map a host port to a container port?
multipleChoice.hint: P for port mapping.

multipleChoice.text: What is phpMyAdmin primarily used for?
multipleChoice.hint: Web interface for database administration.

multipleChoice.text: Which Node.js method is used to create a readable stream from a file?
multipleChoice.hint: Creates a stream object, not loading all data at once.

boolean.text: Node.js is single-threaded for JavaScript execution.
boolean.hint: It uses one main thread for the event loop.

boolean.text: Express is a database management system.
boolean.hint: Express is for building web applications, not databases.

boolean.text: The `npm install` command installs dependencies listed in package.json.
A Docker container is the same as a virtual machine.
boolean.hint: Containers share the host kernel, VMs have their own OS.

boolean.text: The `package.json` file is used to configure Docker containers.
boolean.hint: package.json is for Node.js, Docker uses Dockerfiles.
WAMP stands for Windows, Apache, MySQL, PHP.

boolean.text: MongoDB stores data in JSON-like documents.
The `docker run` command builds a Docker image.
boolean.hint: docker build builds, docker run runs a container.

identification.text: The Node.js pattern using .on() and .emit() for custom events.
identification.hint: Core module in Node.js for event-driven programming.

identification.text: The file that defines the steps to build a Docker image.
The web-based tool used to manage MySQL databases in WAMP.
The Node.js global object that provides command-line arguments.
identification.hint: Also gives access to environment variables.

identification.text: The SQL command used to remove all records from a table.
identification.hint: Can be dangerous without a WHERE clause.

identification.text: The protocol used to serve web pages and resources.
The file containing the dependencies and scripts for a Node.js project.
The C library that provides the Node.js event loop and thread pool.
identification.hint: Handles asynchronous I/O at the OS level.

identification.text: The MongoDB shell command to list all databases.
